hooks.command: FILE="$TOOL_INPUT_FILE"; if [[ "$FILE" == *.kt ]]; then ktlint --format "$FILE" 2>/dev/null || true; fi

cd "$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null || echo .)" && echo '=== SESSION END VERIFICATION ===' && if [ -f gradlew ]; then echo '[Build]' && timeout 120 ./gradlew assembleDebug --quiet 2>&1 | tail -5 && echo '[Tests]' && timeout 120 ./gradlew test --quiet 2>&1 | tail -5; else echo 'No Gradle wrapper — skipping verification'; fi
